title: althaea taurinensis
intro: Althaea taurinensis is a type of marshmallow plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, due to the presence of mucilages that provide relief from irritated tissues. The health benefits of Althaea taurinensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce coughs and sore throats, and alleviate skin irritations. Althaea taurinensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or syrup, and is often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory and digestive health.
